name: 2 Tier Collapsible Cart with Bins - Brightroom™
description:
Make a stylish addition to your home storage essentials with the 2 Tier Collapsible Cart with Bins from Brightroom™. This white cart features an X-shaped design with bins to give you ample space for towels, blankets, toys, and other items. It boasts a two-tiered, collapsible design for convenient storage when not in use, and the bins have side cutouts for easy holding and lifting. Made of plastic in a powder-coated finish, this collapsible cart has rolling wheels for easy movement.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
